column2: How often do you find out about free food events on campus AFTER they have already happened?
column3: If there was a live campus map showing free food at club events right now, how likely would you be to check it before or between classes?
column4: Does the "professionalism" of an event (e.g., a corporate networking night vs. a casual club social) change how likely you are to show up just for the food?
column5: Would you be MORE likely to use a food-finding tool if it was completely anonymous (no account, no login, and club leaders can't see who found the event through the app)?
column6: Which information is MOST important for you to see before walking into a room for free food? (Select top 2)
